specializations: Conditioning agents for hair care — cationic polymers and quaternary ammonium compounds

product_highlights: Comprehensive conditioning agent portfolio for all hair types and ethnicities
Sustainable biopolymers replacing petrochemical ingredients in hair care
Specialty surfactants for mild, effective cleansing formulations
Film formers providing styling hold, heat protection, and shine
Rheology modifiers for optimal texture in shampoos and conditioners
notes: Dutch specialty chemicals major with a comprehensive portfolio of sustainable and efficient polymers, biopolymers, and specialty surfactants for hair care. Nouryon is a leader in conditioning agents, film formers, and rheology modifiers for shampoo and conditioner formulations, with a strong focus on sustainability through biopolymer innovation. Their specialty surfactants enable mild, effective cleansing for sensitive scalp and color-treated hair formulations.
